     The Numbers Business Report

Downsizing (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $24,449,754Details
International Box Office $30,013,217
Worldwide Box Office $54,462,971
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,187,090
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,662,869
Total $2,849,959
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When scientists discover how to shrink humans to five inches tall as a solution to over-population, Paul and his wife Audrey decide to abandon their stressed lives in order to get small and move to a new downsized community—a choice that triggers life-changing adventures.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,954,287 (20.3% of total gross)
Legs:4.94 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$68,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,668 opening theaters/2,668 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $32,450,326

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 22nd, 2017 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: December 22nd, 2017 (Wide) (Australia)
December 22nd, 2017 (Wide), released as Una vida a lo grande (Spain)
December 28th, 2017 (Wide) (South Korea)
December 29th, 2017 (Wide), released as Zmenšování (Czech Republic)
January 12th, 2018 (Wide) (France)
Video Release: March 6th, 2018 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for language including sexual references, some graphic nudity and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2505 (Cert #50693), 12/6/2017)
Running Time: 135 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Gratuitous Cameos
Plot point: Human Experimentation, Relationships Gone Wrong, Satire, Therapist, Tiny Worlds
Social setting: Therapists / Therapy
Subgenre: Satirical Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, Annapurna Pictures, Ad Hominem Enterpises
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
